assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes Phase 2 dedicated to Istio compatibility validation with commands to check current Istio version and verify K8s 1.32 support

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions checking https://istio.io/latest/docs/releases/supported-releases/ and states 'Istio typically supports N-2 Kubernetes versions'

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: States 'If your Istio is more than 2 minor versions behind K8s 1.32, upgrade Istio first before proceeding to node pools'

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Addresses this in 'Sidecar Injection During Pod Recreation' section with risk description and mitigation commands for webhook validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands to 'Check sidecar injection working on new nodes' and verify istio-proxy presence in pod YAML

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes 'istioctl proxy-status' commands throughout validation sections and post-upgrade checklist to ensure proxy consistency

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod -o jsonpath' for version and 'istioctl proxy-status' for sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While it mentions various traffic disruption scenarios, it doesn't specifically warn about control plane and sidecar version mismatch causing traffic issues
